injuryUpdates.source: Caught Offside, Yahoo Sports, Daily Cannon, beIN Sports - May 2026
injuryUpdates.notes: Initial scans were not alarming but the issue proved worse than expected. Returned to partial training in early May; Guardiola says he is 'getting better'. Expected to recover in time for the tournament but second injury setback of the season after the ACL rehab.

injuryUpdates.notes: Recovery exceeding medical expectations. Back training on grass without pain in early May, targeting return before end of Arsenal's season including the Champions League final. Now on track for the tournament.

injuryUpdates.injuryType: Fully recovered from inner meniscus tear (Sep 2025)

injuryUpdates.notes: Recovered to the level of forcing his way back into Spain's preliminary squad. Performances in the last month convinced de la Fuente; included in the 55-man pre-list on May 11.

squadChanges.details: Real Madrid captain left out of Spain's 55-man preliminary pre-selection due to a fractured toe and a season of fitness setbacks. Effectively ends his tournament hopes and is expected to lead to his international retirement.

bettingOddsUpdate.source: BetMGM / bet365 / BET99 / Stake aggregated via VegasInsider and Canada Sports Betting - May 16, 2026
bettingOddsUpdate.notes: Spain co-favorite to win the tournament at +450, level with France. Top of ticket count at BetMGM. Group H exit and group qualification markets not publicly aggregated; Spain is overwhelming favorite in Group H over Uruguay, Saudi Arabia and Cape Verde.

summary: Spain's biggest pre-tournament story is a hamstring crisis on the wings: Lamine Yamal (torn hamstring vs Celta Vigo, April 22) is racing to be fit for the group stage and is expected to miss the opener, and Nico Williams suffered a moderate hamstring strain vs Valencia on May 10 with a 3-week recovery window. Rodri picked up a groin issue at Manchester City but is recovering and Mikel Merino is finally back training on grass, while veteran Dani Carvajal has been dropped from the 55-man preliminary list and is expected to retire from international duty. Two upcoming warm-ups (Iraq on June 4, Peru on June 8) will be the final tune-ups before the final 26-man squad is named on May 25.
